prompt: Create a data table columns definition for a user list with the following columns: name (TextCell with ellipsis), status (TagCell with blue color), account balance (CurrencyCell in USD format), created date (DateTimeCell with YYYY-MM-DD format), and an Edit action (ActionCell). The table should use Ant Design Table component.
assertions: Uses TextCell with ellipsis attribute for name column
Uses TagCell with color attribute for status column
Uses CurrencyCell with USD format for balance column
Uses DateTimeCell with YYYY-MM-DD format for date column
Uses ActionCell with onClick handler for Edit action
Columns array is properly structured for Ant Design Table
